data.html:
version: '3.8'

services:
  redis:
    image: redis:7-alpine
    container_name: forge-studio-redis
    ports:
      - "6379:6379"
    volumes:
      - redis-data:/data
    command: redis-server --appendonly yes
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "redis-cli", "ping"]
      interval: 10s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 5
    networks:
      - forge-network

  postgres:
    image: postgres:17
    container_name: forge-studio-postgres
    environment:
      POSTGRES_USER: ${POSTGRES_USER:-forge}
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: ${POSTGRES_PASSWORD:-forge_password}
      POSTGRES_DB: ${POSTGRES_DB:-forge_studio}
    ports:
      - "5434:5432"
    volumes:
      - postgres-data:/var/lib/postgresql/data
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD-SHELL", "pg_isready -U ${POSTGRES_USER:-forge}"]
      interval: 10s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 5
    networks:
      - forge-network

  nginx:
    image: nginx:alpine
    container_name: forge-studio-nginx
    ports:
      - "80:80"
    volumes:
      - ./nginx/nginx.conf:/etc/nginx/nginx.conf:ro
    depends_on:
      - app
    networks:
      - forge-network
    restart: unless-stopped

  app:
    build:
      context: .
      dockerfile: Dockerfile
    container_name: forge-studio-app
    environment:
      NODE_ENV: production
      PORT: 5051
      DATABASE_URL: postgresql://${POSTGRES_USER:-forge}:${POSTGRES_PASSWORD:-forge_password}@postgres:5432/${POSTGRES_DB:-forge_studio}
      REDIS_URL: redis://redis:6379/1
      LITELLM_URL: ${LITELLM_URL:-http://host.docker.internal:5050}
      LITELLM_API_KEY: ${LITELLM_API_KEY:-sk-ai-lab-master-key}
      JWT_SECRET: ${JWT_SECRET:-your-jwt-secret}
    expose:
      - "5051"
    depends_on:
      redis:
        condition: service_healthy
      postgres:
        condition: service_healthy
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "curl", "-f", "http://localhost:5051/health"]
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 3
      start_period: 20s
    networks:
      - forge-network
    restart: unless-stopped

  ollama:
    image: ollama/ollama:latest
    container_name: forge-studio-ollama
    environment:
      OLLAMA_HOST: 0.0.0.0:11434
    ports:
      - "11434:11434"
    volumes:
      - ollama-data:/root/.ollama
    networks:
      - forge-network
    restart: unless-stopped
    profiles:
      - with-ollama

volumes:
  redis-data:
    driver: local
  postgres-data:
    driver: local
  ollama-data:
    driver: local

networks:
  forge-network:
    driver: bridge
